/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkestf.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkestf.so CMakeFiles/fawkestf.dir/time_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkestf.dir/static_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkestf.dir/transform_listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkestf.dir/transformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkestf.dir/exceptions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkestf.dir/buffer_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkestf.dir/fawkestf_tolua.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkestf.dir/transform_publisher.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib:/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/interfaces /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesblackboard.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/interfaces/libTransformInterface.so -lLinearMath -lm -L/usr/lib64 -lBulletSoftBody -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lLinearMath /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetcomm.so -lavahi-common -lavahi-client -lcrypto /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesinterface.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so -L/usr/lib64 -llua-5.1 -ldl -ltolua++ -lmagic -ldaemon /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -lm -lrt -ldl -lpthread -lstdc++ -luuid /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -lBulletSoftBody -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lm
